name: servicetitan-memberships-pp-mcp
description: Memberships API surface as MCP tools.

st_client_id.title: ST_CLIENT_ID
st_client_id.description: Sets ST_CLIENT_ID for the Memberships MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.

st_client_secret.title: ST_CLIENT_SECRET
st_client_secret.description: Sets ST_CLIENT_SECRET for the Memberships MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
